templates.name: Debian 11
templates.description: Debian is a computer operating system composed of software packages released as free and open source software primarily under the GNU General Public License along with other free software licenses. Debian GNU/Linux, which includes the GNU OS tools and Linux kernel, is a popular and influential Linux distribution. It is distributed with access to repositories containing thousands of software packages ready for installation and use. Debian is known for relatively strict adherence to the philosophies of Unix and free software as well as using collaborative software development and testing processes.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
templates.description: Ubuntu is a computer operating system based on the Debian Linux distribution and distributed as free and open source software, using its own desktop environment. Ubuntu is designed primarily for use on personal computers, although a server edition also exists.

templates.name: CentOS 9 Stream
templates.description: CentOS is a free operating system distribution based upon the Linux kernel. It is derived entirely from the Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) distribution. CentOS exists to provide a free enterprise-class computing platform and strives to maintain 100% binary compatibility with its upstream source, Red Hat. CentOS stands for Community Enterprise Operating System.

templates.name: Rocky Linux 8
templates.description: Rocky Linux is a Linux distribution developed by Rocky Enterprise Software Foundation. It is intended to be a downstream, complete binary-compatible release using the Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system source code.

templates.name: Rocky Linux 9
templates.description: Rocky Linux is a Linux distribution developed by Rocky Enterprise Software Foundation. It is intended to be a downstream, complete binary-compatible release using the Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system source code.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 8
templates.description: AlmaLinux is a free and open source Linux distribution, created originally by CloudLinux to provide a community-supported, production-grade enterprise operating system that is binary-compatible with Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9
templates.description: AlmaLinux is a free and open source Linux distribution, created originally by CloudLinux to provide a community-supported, production-grade enterprise operating system that is binary-compatible with Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

templates.name: Debian 12
templates.description: Debian is a computer operating system composed of software packages released as free and open source software primarily under the GNU General Public License along with other free software licenses. Debian GNU/Linux, which includes the GNU OS tools and Linux kernel, is a popular and influential Linux distribution. It is distributed with access to repositories containing thousands of software packages ready for installation and use. Debian is known for relatively strict adherence to the philosophies of Unix and free software as well as using collaborative software development and testing processes.

templates.name: Arch Linux
templates.description: Arch Linux is an independently developed, x86-64 general-purpose Linux distribution that strives to provide the latest stable versions of most software by following a rolling-release model. The default installation is a minimal base system, configured by the user to only add what is purposely required.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Nextcloud
templates.description: Nextcloud is a suite of client-server software for creating and using file hosting services. Nextcloud provides functionality similar to Dropbox, Office 365 or Google Drive when used with integrated office suites Collabora Online or OnlyOffice.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Plex Media Server
templates.description:
Plex Media Server is free software that allows users to create a client–server for movies, television shows, and music. Free Plex accounts can share personal media libraries among a user's own collection of devices or with friends.

Plex Media Server organizes movie and television content and adds posters, plot summaries, cast and crew lists, technical details, critical reviews, and subtitles.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with GitLab
templates.description:
Self-hosted GitLab, an open-source DevOps platform, empowers you to install and manage it on your own infrastructure. Its comprehensive suite of features caters to code management, issue tracking, CI/CD, and more. With self-hosted GitLab, you gain complete control over your data, security, and customization, making it a cost-effective solution for teams and organizations of all sizes.
GitLab Configuration options

templates.name: CloudLinux 8 Solo
templates.description: CloudLinux OS Solo includes website monitoring, performance detection, and performance optimization tools, they allow to make sure that the website is up and running, help in investigating problems with WordPress, PHP, Database, and speed up a website.

templates.name: CloudLinux 8
templates.description: CloudLinux the operating system for multi-tenancy of shared server. It isolates each customer into a separate environment, which partitions, allocates, and limits server resources, like memory, CPU, and connections, for each tenant.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with OpenVPN
templates.description: OpenVPN is a trusted open-source VPN software that creates secure and encrypted connections for remote access and private networking. With robust encryption protocols and versatile compatibility, OpenVPN ensures privacy and data protection.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Jitsi
templates.description: Jitsi is an open-source video conferencing tool recognized for its security and user-friendly features. It supports real-time communication with options like screen sharing and chat, making it a popular choice for remote collaboration.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with ElasticSearch
templates.description: Elasticsearch is an open-source, distributed search and analytics engine built on Apache Lucene. It is designed for horizontal scalability, real-time search, and big data analysis, making it ideal for log and event data, full-text search, and complex queries.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Zabbix
templates.description: Zabbix is an open-source monitoring tool designed for tracking the status and performance of network services, servers, and other network hardware. It offers real-time monitoring of thousands of metrics collected from servers, virtual machines, and network devices. Zabbix provides features like visualization, alerting, and reporting, allowing for comprehensive analysis and troubleshooting.

templates.name: Kali Linux
templates.description: Kali Linux is a powerful, open-source operating system widely used for digital forensics and penetration testing. Developed by Offensive Security, it comes pre-loaded with a comprehensive suite of tools for security auditing, network testing, and identifying vulnerabilities within an IT environment. Kali Linux is designed for cybersecurity professionals and IT experts, featuring a customizable environment that supports a wide range of hardware platforms.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
templates.description: Ubuntu is a computer operating system based on the Debian Linux distribution and distributed as free and open source software, using its own desktop environment. Ubuntu is designed primarily for use on personal computers, although a server edition also exists.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with VS Code
templates.description: VS Code Server is a cloud-based development environment that lets you run Visual Studio Code in a remote, browser-based setup. It allows developers to work directly on cloud servers or virtual machines while accessing the full power of Visual Studio Code extensions and features.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Ollama
templates.description: Ollama is a platform that simplifies access to large language models. We have combined it with Open WebUI for an enhanced user experience. It provides an intuitive interface that allows developers to run, manage, and deploy AI models efficiently. With support for a range of models and seamless web integration, Ollama streamlines model deployment, making it easy to experiment, collaborate, and build applications leveraging powerful language models.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with TinyCP
templates.description: TinyCP is a lightweight web-based control panel designed for managing Linux servers, offering features like domain management, database administration, and file management through an intuitive interface. It is suitable for both small personal projects and larger professional deployments due to its simplicity and efficiency.

templates.name: Alpine Linux
templates.description: Alpine Linux is an independent, non-commercial, general purpose Linux distribution designed for power users who appreciate security, simplicity and resource efficiency.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Coolify
templates.description: Coolify is an open-source platform that simplifies the deployment and management of applications via a user-friendly control panel. It supports Docker, Kubernetes, and virtual machines, enabling continuous deployment from Git repositories. With tools for monitoring and resource management, Coolify is ideal for developers and teams aiming to streamline DevOps workflows.

templates.name: openSUSE Leap 15.6
templates.description: openSUSE is an open-source community project with Linux-based distributions that is sponsored by SUSE Software Solutions Germany GmbH and other companies. The openSUSE Project has a large global community that develops openSUSE in collaboration with the open-source community and corporate sponsors. The project’s distributions are free to download any time at no cost.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Owncast
templates.description: Owncast is an open-source, self-hosted streaming service that offers extensive customization and privacy for live broadcasts. It includes features like chat, viewer analytics, and configurable settings, making it ideal for creators seeking independence from commercial platforms and seeking full control over their streaming content and audience interactions.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Dokploy
templates.description: Dokploy is a platform designed to streamline application deployment and management across various environments. It automates key DevOps tasks such as deployments and scaling, integrates with existing CI/CD pipelines, and supports multiple programming languages and frameworks. With its user-friendly interface, Dokploy helps teams enhance efficiency and maintain application performance effectively.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Remote Desktop
templates.description:
XRDP is a free and open-source implementation of Microsoft RDP server that enables operating systems other than Microsoft Windows to provide a fully functional RDP-compatible remote desktop experience.
  • To connect to VPS you need a local computer with an RDP client installed. A list of available RDP clients for different operating systems is provided below:
  • On Windows, you can use the default Remote Desktop Connection application.
  • On macOS, you can use the Microsoft Remote Desktop application.
  • On Linux, you can use FreeRDP, or Remmina.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with CloudPanel
templates.description:
CloudPanel is a free and modern server control panel to configure and manage a server with an obsessive focus on simplicity.

Run PHP, Node.js, Static Websites, Reverse Proxies, and Python Applications in no time on a High-Performance Technology Stack.

templates.name: Debian 12 with FreePBX
templates.description: FreePBX is an open-source, web-based management tool for the Asterisk PBX system, offering a user-friendly interface for handling telephone communications. It supports features such as VoIP, call routing, and voicemail, providing a flexible and cost-effective telephony solution for businesses of all sizes.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with KUSANAGI 9
templates.description: Ultra-fast CMS platform "KUSANAGI" developed and provided by Prime Strategy is a Linux based tuned server OS (Virual Machine Image) that runs WordPress and other CMS fast and securely.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Node.js
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Node.js One-Click app automatically installs performance web server OpenLiteSpeed, and Node.js. This image tends to be more than 4 times faster than Node.js with Nginx! OpenLiteSpeed features easy setup for SSL and RewriteRules.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and WordPress
templates.description:
The OpenLiteSpeed WordPress One-Click app is based on a standard WordPress image, but includes several great performance enhancements, including LiteSpeed's popular LSCache optimization plugin. This Wordpress + OpenLiteSpeed + LSCache image tends to be more than 300 times faster than a regular WordPress image!

OpenLiteSpeed WordPress One-Click automatically installs OpenLiteSpeed, LSCache, WordPress and any dependences. It also automates initial setup for components like Object Cache and PHP OPCache to reduce the time it takes to optimize a web server.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Django
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Django One-Click app automatically installs performance web server OpenLiteSpeed, and Django. This image tends to be up to 2.5 times faster than Django on Nginx with Gunicorn! Developers can update files directly without using the built-in development server. OpenLiteSpeed features easy setup for SSL and RewriteRules.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Rails
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Rails One-Click app automatically installs performance web server OpenLiteSpeed, Ruby and Rails.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Joomla
templates.description:
The OpenLiteSpeed Joomla One-Click app is based on a standard Joomla image. Once you complete the setup, this Joomla + OpenLiteSpeed + LSCache image tends to be much faster than a regular Joomla image!

OpenLiteSpeed Joomla One-Click automatically installs OpenLiteSpeed, Joomla! and any dependences. It also automates initial setup for components like PHP OPCache to reduce the time it takes to optimize a web server.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Drupal
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Drupal One-Click automatically installs OpenLiteSpeed, Drupal and LSCache. It also automates initial setup for components like PHP OPCache to reduce the time it takes to optimize a web server.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with DirectAdmin
templates.description:
DirectAdmin is a graphical web-based web hosting control panel allowing administration of websites through a web browser. The software is configurable to enable standalone, reseller, and shared web hosting from a single instance
Our DirectAdmin template is preinstalled with OpenLiteSpeed and MariaDB

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenCart
templates.description: OpenCart is a user-friendly, open-source e-commerce platform ideal for small to medium-sized businesses. It features multi-store management, diverse payment gateways, and customizable themes. OpenCart simplifies online store management with an efficient administrative dashboard, making it an effective solution for quick and easy online retail setup.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with TYPO3
templates.description: TYPO3 is an open-source CMS designed for building complex websites and web applications. It offers extensive customization through numerous extensions and features a user-friendly back-end. Known for scalability, strong multilingual support, and adaptability, TYPO3 is ideal for organizations needing a versatile web content management solution.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Laravel
templates.description: Laravel is a powerful open-source PHP framework designed for efficient web development, offering elegant syntax and features like routing, authentication, and caching. It includes tools such as Eloquent ORM and Blade templating, supported by extensive documentation and a vibrant community, making it ideal for creating scalable and maintainable web applications.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Strapi
templates.description: Strapi is a versatile open-source headless CMS based on Node.js, enabling quick API creation with customizable content types and extensive permissions. It supports RESTful and GraphQL APIs for seamless content delivery across platforms, offering flexibility and scalability for developers.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with WordPress
templates.description: WordPress is a popular open-source content management system known for its versatility and ease of use. Launched in 2003, it has grown from a blogging platform to a powerful tool for creating any type of website. Its strength lies in a vast ecosystem of themes and plugins, allowing for extensive customization and functionality. WordPress is accessible to beginners while offering advanced features for developers, making it ideal for both personal and professional websites. With a strong community support system, it remains a top choice for web development, offering tools for SEO, social media integration, and mobile responsiveness.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Ghost
templates.description: Ghost CMS is a modern, open-source content management system designed for professional publishing. It is particularly renowned for its simplicity, speed, and streamlined user experience. Built on Node.js, Ghost CMS differentiates itself from traditional CMS platforms by focusing primarily on blogging and content creation. It offers a clean, minimalist editor, live preview features, and a range of SEO and social sharing options

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Magento 2
templates.description: Magento 2 is a scalable, open-source e-commerce platform with a user-friendly interface, offering extensive customization, robust SEO, and mobile responsiveness. It supports multiple payment and shipping options, ideal for businesses looking to manage and enhance their online store efficiently.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Akaunting
templates.description: Akaunting is a free, open-source, and online accounting software for small businesses and freelancers.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with WooCommerce
templates.description: WooCommerce is a popular open-source e-commerce plugin for WordPress. It is designed for small to large-sized online merchants using WordPress, offering a range of customizable options for building an online store. Its flexibility and ease of integration with WordPress make it a widely favored choice for businesses looking to sell products and services online.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with PrestaShop
templates.description:
PrestaShop is a freemium, open source e-commerce platform. The software is published under the Open Software License. It is written in the PHP programming language with support for the MySQL database management system. It has a software dependency on the Symfony PHP framework.

CloudPanel is a free and modern server control panel to configure and manage a server with an obsessive focus on simplicity.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Moodle
templates.description:
Moodle is an open-source learning management system (LMS) widely used for creating and managing online educational courses. It provides a platform for educators to organize content, deliver lessons, and interact with students in a virtual learning environment. Moodle supports various multimedia formats, quizzes, assignments, and collaborative activities.

CloudPanel is a free and modern server control panel to configure and manage a server with an obsessive focus on simplicity.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Docker
templates.description: Docker is a cutting-edge containerization platform that revolutionizes the way software applications are developed, shipped, and deployed. By encapsulating an application and its dependencies within a lightweight container, Docker empowers developers to create consistent, isolated environments that function seamlessly across various computing environments, from development to production.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Easypanel
templates.description: Easypanel is a user-friendly control panel that simplifies server management. With its intuitive interface, you can effortlessly install applications, configure domains, manage email accounts, databases, and monitor server performance. It offers practical features like a file manager, DNS settings, and SSL certificate management, providing a seamless experience for beginners and experienced users alike. Focus on your website or application while leaving the technicalities to Easypanel.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Appwrite
templates.description: Appwrite is an open-source backend-as-a-service (BaaS) platform that simplifies the development of web, mobile, and server-side applications. It provides pre-built APIs for managing databases, authentication, cloud functions, and more, enabling developers to focus on building features without worrying about backend infrastructure. Designed for scalability and security, Appwrite supports multiple platforms and programming languages.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Uptime Kuma
templates.description: Uptime Kuma is a self-hosted monitoring tool designed to track the uptime status of websites, applications, or network services. It provides real-time alerts via various notification methods when monitored services go down or experience issues. Use cases include monitoring server availability, ensuring website uptime for businesses, and tracking the performance of APIs or critical infrastructure.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with cPanel
templates.description: cPanel - Web Hosting Management. The cPanel & WHM software package is an easy-to-use control panel that gives web hosts, and the website owners they serve, the ability to quickly and easily manage their servers and websites.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with Plesk
templates.description:
Plesk was designed to install and manage web hosting systems and applications on a single server. The control panel is designed to simplify the management and administration of the web sites by automating various tasks on a single server. Plesk allows a server administrator to set up new websites, reseller accounts, email accounts, and DNS entries through a web-based interface.
Plesk has integrated support for various Content Management Systems including WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, and other web software such as git, Docker, Multi-server management, as well as framework ready environment for Node.js, PHP, Python, Ruby on rails, and more.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with CyberPanel
templates.description: CyberPanel is a next-generation hosting control panel powered by OpenLiteSpeed/LiteSpeed. Built for speed, security, and reliability, CyberPanel automatically comes with built-in support for DNS, FTP, Databases, Email, File Manager, automatic SSL, and many other features, all this is free.

templates.name: Fedora Cloud 41
templates.description: Fedora Cloud is a streamlined version of the Fedora operating system tailored for cloud computing, offering a minimal footprint for containerized applications. It supports cutting-edge cloud technologies like Docker and Kubernetes, facilitating efficient container management. Ideal for developers and sysadmins, Fedora Cloud ensures fast, secure, and scalable deployments in both public and private cloud environments.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with Webuzo
templates.description:
Webuzo is a Single User Control Panel that helps users deploy Web Apps (WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, etc) or System Apps (Apache, NGINX, PHP, Java, MongoDB, etc) on their virtual machines or in the Cloud. Webuzo enables you to focus more on using applications rather than maintaining them. Webuzo is also available in the form of Virtual Appliances.
More information about Webuzo on webuzo.com
Follow the instructions on how to finish Webuzo installation.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with Webmin
templates.description:
Webmin is a web-based interface for system administration for Unix. Using any modern web browser, you can setup user accounts, Apache, DNS, file sharing and much more. Webmin removes the need to manually edit Unix configuration files like /etc/passwd, and lets you manage a system from the console or remotely. More information about Webmin you will find at http://www.webmin.com/

Virtualmin is a powerful and flexible web hosting control panel for Linux and UNIX systems based on the well-known Open Source web-based systems management GUI, Webmin. Manage your virtual domains, mailboxes, databases, applications, and the entire server, from one comprehensive and friendly interface

More information about Virtualmin you will find at http://www.virtualmin.com/

Pre Installed network services are:
Apache
MySQL database
PHP

templates.name: Debian 12 with MediaWiki
templates.description: MediaWiki is an open-source wiki platform known for running Wikipedia. It supports collaborative editing and is highly scalable, with extensive customization options via extensions. Its version control system efficiently tracks changes, making it ideal for community-driven projects and documentation. MediaWiki is a go-to choice for creating detailed, collaborative online resources.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Cloudron
templates.description: Cloudron is a powerful platform that simplifies the deployment and management of web applications on virtual private servers. Designed for users familiar with technologies like Proxmox, PHP, and Bash, Cloudron streamlines the process of hosting and maintaining web apps. With its user-friendly interface, Cloudron enables easy installation, updates, and scaling of applications, making it an efficient solution for individuals and businesses looking to optimize their virtual server environments.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with FASTPANEL
templates.description: FASTPANEL is a web hosting control panel designed to simplify the management of servers and websites. It provides an intuitive user interface for tasks such as domain management, email setup, and database administration. With its focus on efficiency and ease of use, FASTPANEL is suitable for both novice users and experienced system administrators.

templates.name: CloudLinux 9
templates.description: CloudLinux the operating system for multi-tenancy of shared server. It isolates each customer into a separate environment, which partitions, allocates, and limits server resources, like memory, CPU, and connections, for each tenant.

templates.name: CentOS 10 Stream
templates.description: CentOS is a free operating system distribution based upon the Linux kernel. It is derived entirely from the Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) distribution. CentOS exists to provide a free enterprise-class computing platform and strives to maintain 100% binary compatibility with its upstream source, Red Hat. CentOS stands for Community Enterprise Operating System.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Redmine
templates.description: Redmine is an open-source project management and issue-tracking application that facilitates team collaboration and workflow management. It features customizable dashboards, time tracking, Gantt charts, and integration with various version control systems.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MetaTrader 5
templates.description: MetaTrader 5 (MT5) is a multi-asset trading platform designed for forex, stocks, and futures trading, offering advanced tools for market analysis and automated trading. It features enhanced charting, a wider range of technical indicators, support for more order types, and a built-in economic calendar, making it a comprehensive solution for professional traders.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MetaTrader 4
templates.description: MetaTrader 4 (MT4) is a trading platform for forex, commodities, and CFDs that offers powerful tools for market analysis and automated trading. It features customizable charts, technical indicators, algorithmic trading via Expert Advisors (EAs), and support for multiple order types, providing a versatile solution for traders of all levels.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Portainer
templates.description: Portainer is your container management platform to deploy, troubleshoot, and secure applications across cloud, datacenter, and Industrial IoT use cases.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Dokku
templates.description: Dokku is an extensible, open source Platform as a Service that runs on a single server of your choice. Dokku supports building apps on the fly from a git push via either Dockerfile or by auto-detecting the language with Buildpacks, and then starts containers based on your built image. Using technologies such as nginx and cron, Web processes are automatically routed to, while background processes and automated cron tasks are also managed by Dokku.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with ASP.NET
templates.description: ASP.NET is a framework developed by Microsoft using the .NET framework to allow you to create innovative and modern web applications. It allows the use of the C#, F#, and Visual Basic programming languages in a modern Linux environment.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Peppermint.sh
templates.description: Peppermint.sh is an open source ticket management and help desk solution. It is a self-hosted alternative to commercial help desk solutions like Freshdesk and Zendesk. Peppermint.sh is written in React and Node.js and is deployed using Docker.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Grafana
templates.description: Grafana Open Source Software (OSS) enables you to query, visualize, alert on, and explore your metrics, logs, and traces wherever they’re stored. Grafana data source plugins enable you to query data sources including time series databases like Prometheus and CloudWatch, logging tools like Loki and Elasticsearch, NoSQL/SQL databases like Postgres, CI/CD tooling like GitHub, and many more. Grafana OSS provides you with tools to display that data on live dashboards with insightful graphs and visualizations.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with ClusterControl
templates.description: ClusterControl is a database management platform that simplifies deployment, monitoring, and automation for MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. It offers features like backups, failover, performance tuning, and security to ensure high availability and reliability.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Anaconda
templates.description: Anaconda is a popular open-source distribution of Python and R for data science, machine learning, and AI. It includes package management, environment management, and pre-installed libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and TensorFlow, making it easy to develop and deploy data-driven applications.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with PocketBase
templates.description: PocketBase is a versatile mobile database app designed for organizing and managing data on the go. It allows users to create custom databases, store information securely, and access data offline, making it ideal for both personal and professional use. With its user-friendly interface, PocketBase simplifies data management tasks wherever you are.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with n8n
templates.description: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that allows users to connect apps, services, and APIs with a visual, node-based interface. It enables automation of tasks, data processing, and integration between different systems without coding, offering flexibility and customization for various use cases.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with LEMP Stack (Nginx, MySQL, PHP)
templates.description: LEMP is a software stack commonly used for web development. It's an acronym that stands for Linux, Nginx, MySQL, and PHP. Each component in the stack plays a specific role in hosting and serving web applications.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with LAMP Stack (Apache, MySQL, PHP)
templates.description: LAMP stands for Linux, Apache, MySQL, and PHP. Together, they provide a proven set of software for delivering high-performance web applications. Each component contributes essential capabilities to the stack.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Discourse
templates.description: Discourse is an open-source forum platform designed to create engaged online communities. It offers real-time notifications, a dynamic user interface, and robust moderation tools. Highly customizable and integrating well with third-party services.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Bluesky
templates.description: Bluesky is a decentralized social media platform built on the AT Protocol, giving users control over their data and online experience. It enables interoperability, transparency, and algorithmic choice for a more open and user-driven network.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with AzuraCast
templates.description:
AzuraCast is a free and open-source, self-hosted, all-in-one web radio management suite.

Using AzuraCast and its powerful, intuitive web interface, you can start up a fully working web radio station in a few quick minutes. AzuraCast works for web radio stations of all types and sizes, and is built to run on even the most affordable cloud virtual machines.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with n8n (queue mode)
templates.description: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that allows users to connect apps, services, and APIs with a visual, node-based interface. It enables automation of tasks, data processing, and integration between different systems without coding, offering flexibility and customization for various use cases. This template is ideal for automation agencies or power users handling high volumes of workflow executions.

templates.name: Ubuntu 25.04
templates.description: Ubuntu is a computer operating system based on the Debian Linux distribution and distributed as free and open source software, using its own desktop environment. Ubuntu is designed primarily for use on personal computers, although a server edition also exists.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Jellyfin
templates.description: Jellyfin is a free, open-source media server that lets you collect, organize, and stream your personal media like movies, music, and TV shows. It runs on your server and gives you full control to access your content from any device without subscriptions or restrictions.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Chatwoot
templates.description: Chatwoot is an open-source customer engagement platform that enables businesses to manage conversations across multiple communication channels — including website live chat, email, Facebook, WhatsApp, and more — from a single unified inbox. It offers features like real-time messaging, automation, canned responses, team collaboration tools, and analytics, making it ideal for support and sales teams. Chatwoot is designed to be self-hosted or cloud-deployed, giving organizations full control over their data and customization.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Flowise
templates.description: Flowise is an open-source, drag-and-drop tool for visually building and deploying LLM (Large Language Model) applications. It simplifies the creation of AI workflows by connecting components like prompts, models, and APIs without requiring extensive coding knowledge.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Windmill
templates.description: Windmill is an open-source developer platform and workflow engine that transforms scripts into production-ready applications, APIs, and automated workflows. It supports multiple programming languages—including Python, TypeScript, Go.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Airflow
templates.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for authoring, scheduling, and monitoring workflows as directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). Designed for scalability and flexibility, it allows users to programmatically define complex data pipelines and automate tasks across a wide range of systems.

templates.name: Fedora Cloud 42
templates.description: Fedora Cloud is a streamlined version of the Fedora operating system tailored for cloud computing, offering a minimal footprint for containerized applications. It supports cutting-edge cloud technologies like Docker and Kubernetes, facilitating efficient container management. Ideal for developers and sysadmins, Fedora Cloud ensures fast, secure, and scalable deployments in both public and private cloud environments.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Home Assistant
templates.description: Home Assistant is an open-source platform that allows you to control, automate, and monitor smart home devices from a single, privacy-focused dashboard. It supports thousands of integrations and runs entirely locally, giving you full control over your home automation setup.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Node-RED
templates.description: Node-RED is a low-code programming tool for wiring together hardware devices, APIs, and online services using a visual flow-based interface. Built on Node.js, it enables users to create automations and IoT applications quickly by connecting blocks of logic without extensive coding.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 10
templates.description: AlmaLinux is a free and open source Linux distribution, created originally by CloudLinux to provide a community-supported, production-grade enterprise operating system that is binary-compatible with Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

templates.name: Rocky Linux 10
templates.description: Rocky Linux is a Linux distribution developed by Rocky Enterprise Software Foundation. It is intended to be a downstream, complete binary-compatible release using the Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system source code.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with HestiaCP
templates.description: HestiaCP - Simple and clear interface. Instead of adding more elements to work with, this control panel prefer to remove as much as possible. The main goal of this panel was to improve the ergonomics by reducing unnecessary movements and operations. It is all about using less, because less is more.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with n8n (+100 workflows)
templates.description: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that allows users to connect apps, services, and APIs with a visual, node-based interface. It enables automation of tasks, data processing, and integration between different systems without coding, offering flexibility and customization for various use cases. This template offers you 100+ most popular community workflows pre-installed into your n8n instance.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MCP Server
templates.description: Launches a Remote MCP Server with Python, FastMCP, Docker, and an SEO analyzer example. Works with Cursor, Windsurf, and other MCP clients. Just write Python functions to build MCP tools like SSL checkers, data pipelines, and web health monitors - no frontend needed. Perfect for AI engineers, technical SEOs, devs, and tool builders.

templates.name: Debian 13
templates.description: Debian is a computer operating system composed of software packages released as free and open source software primarily under the GNU General Public License along with other free software licenses. Debian GNU/Linux, which includes the GNU OS tools and Linux kernel, is a popular and influential Linux distribution. It is distributed with access to repositories containing thousands of software packages ready for installation and use. Debian is known for relatively strict adherence to the philosophies of Unix and free software as well as using collaborative software development and testing processes.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Claude Code
templates.description: Claude Code is a command-line interface (CLI) for interacting with Anthropic’s Claude language model directly from your terminal. It enables users to run prompts, manage conversations, and automate workflows with Claude using simple commands. Ideal for developers and power users, Claude Code makes it easy to integrate Claude into scripts and development environments without relying on a graphical interface.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with WireGuard
templates.description: wg-easy is a web-based user interface for managing WireGuard VPN servers easily and visually. It simplifies the setup and administration of WireGuard by providing a clean dashboard where you can add or remove clients, view QR codes for quick configuration, and monitor connection status—all without editing config files manually.

templates.name: Debian 13 with Game Panel
templates.description: Game Panel is a Minecraft, Counter-Strike and other Steam games server control panel that allows to manage multiple servers from a single web based user interface.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Posthog
templates.description: PostHog is an open-source product analytics platform that helps teams understand user behavior and improve their software. It offers features like event tracking, session recording, and feature flags, all while allowing data to be stored privately on your own infrastructure. With PostHog, companies can gain deep insights without relying on third-party analytics services.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Sim Studio
templates.description: Sim is an open-source, visual workflow builder for AI agents. It lets you design, test, and deploy LLM-powered workflows through a simple drag-and-drop interface, connecting with tools like Slack, Gmail, Notion and databases. With support for multiple models, structured outputs, and flexible deployment options, Sim makes building and managing AI automations intuitive and collaborative - all without heavy coding

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Immich
templates.description: Immich is an open-source, self-hosted photo and video backup solution designed for mobile devices. It lets you securely store, manage, and access your media on your own server, offering features similar to Google Photos but with full control over your data.

templates.name: Rocky Linux 9 with IceWarp
templates.description: IceWarp is a unified communications and collaboration platform that combines email, team chat, voice and video calls, document editing, and file sharing into one solution. It’s designed for businesses that want a secure, all-in-one alternative to services like Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Mattermost
templates.description: Mattermost is an open-source team collaboration platform offering secure messaging, file sharing, and integrations. Self-hosted alternative to Slack for organizations needing data control.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Odoo
templates.description: Odoo is an open-source, integrated business management software with a modular architecture, supporting functions like CRM, e-commerce, accounting, and project management. Designed for scalability and efficiency, it allows businesses to customize and expand their toolset as needed. Odoo's user-friendly interface and strong community support make it a versatile choice for businesses aiming to streamline operations and enhance productivity.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Supabase
templates.description: Supabase is an open-source backend-as-a-service (BaaS) platform that provides tools for building web and mobile applications. It offers features like a real-time database, authentication, storage, and APIs, making it easier for developers to create and manage apps without complex server setup. Built on top of PostgreSQL, Supabase emphasizes simplicity and scalability with a developer-friendly interface.

templates.name: Ubuntu 25.10
templates.description: Ubuntu is a computer operating system based on the Debian Linux distribution and distributed as free and open source software, using its own desktop environment. Ubuntu is designed primarily for use on personal computers, although a server edition also exists.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Gemini CLI
templates.description: Gemini CLI is a command-line interface for interacting with Google’s Gemini AI models directly from your server. It allows developers to run prompts, generate content, test model capabilities, and integrate AI into scripts and workflows—all through a simple and powerful terminal-based tool.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MEAN Stack (MongoDB, ExpressJS, AngularJS, NodeJS)
templates.description: The MEAN stack is a full-stack development framework that leverages four key technologies: MongoDB (a NoSQL database), Express.js (a web application framework), Angular (a front-end framework), and Node.js (a JavaScript runtime environment). Together, these components enable developers to build scalable and dynamic web applications entirely using JavaScript across the entire development stack.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MERN Stack (MongoDB, ExpressJS, ReactJS, NodeJS)
templates.description: The MERN stack is a web development stack that incorporates MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js, providing a unified JavaScript-based framework for building scalable and efficient applications.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MEVN Stack (MongoDB, ExpressJS, VueJS, NodeJS)
templates.description: The MEVN stack is a modern web development stack consisting of MongoDB, Express.js, Vue.js, and Node.js. It allows developers to build full-stack web applications using JavaScript across the entire development stack.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Docker and Traefik
templates.description: Docker is a modern containerization platform that streamlines how applications are developed, shipped, and deployed. In this template, Docker is paired with Traefik, a powerful reverse proxy and load balancer, to provide automatic routing, SSL management, and secure access to your containers—ensuring consistent, scalable, and production-ready deployments across environments.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Cosmos
templates.description: Cosmos is an open-source self-hosted platform for managing applications, containers, and servers through a unified web interface. It simplifies deploying and running Docker-based services by providing built-in tools for networking, security, reverse proxy, and application management.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with NemoClaw
templates.description: Ubuntu 24.04 with NemoClaw is a ready-to-use VPS template that comes with NVIDIA NemoClaw preinstalled, enabling you to deploy and manage large language model workflows with ease.

templates.name: Debian 11
templates.description: Debian is a computer operating system composed of software packages released as free and open source software primarily under the GNU General Public License along with other free software licenses. Debian GNU/Linux, which includes the GNU OS tools and Linux kernel, is a popular and influential Linux distribution. It is distributed with access to repositories containing thousands of software packages ready for installation and use. Debian is known for relatively strict adherence to the philosophies of Unix and free software as well as using collaborative software development and testing processes.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
templates.description: Ubuntu is a computer operating system based on the Debian Linux distribution and distributed as free and open source software, using its own desktop environment. Ubuntu is designed primarily for use on personal computers, although a server edition also exists.

templates.name: CentOS 9 Stream
templates.description: CentOS is a free operating system distribution based upon the Linux kernel. It is derived entirely from the Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) distribution. CentOS exists to provide a free enterprise-class computing platform and strives to maintain 100% binary compatibility with its upstream source, Red Hat. CentOS stands for Community Enterprise Operating System.

templates.name: Rocky Linux 8
templates.description: Rocky Linux is a Linux distribution developed by Rocky Enterprise Software Foundation. It is intended to be a downstream, complete binary-compatible release using the Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system source code.

templates.name: Rocky Linux 9
templates.description: Rocky Linux is a Linux distribution developed by Rocky Enterprise Software Foundation. It is intended to be a downstream, complete binary-compatible release using the Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system source code.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 8
templates.description: AlmaLinux is a free and open source Linux distribution, created originally by CloudLinux to provide a community-supported, production-grade enterprise operating system that is binary-compatible with Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9
templates.description: AlmaLinux is a free and open source Linux distribution, created originally by CloudLinux to provide a community-supported, production-grade enterprise operating system that is binary-compatible with Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

templates.name: Debian 12
templates.description: Debian is a computer operating system composed of software packages released as free and open source software primarily under the GNU General Public License along with other free software licenses. Debian GNU/Linux, which includes the GNU OS tools and Linux kernel, is a popular and influential Linux distribution. It is distributed with access to repositories containing thousands of software packages ready for installation and use. Debian is known for relatively strict adherence to the philosophies of Unix and free software as well as using collaborative software development and testing processes.

templates.name: Arch Linux
templates.description: Arch Linux is an independently developed, x86-64 general-purpose Linux distribution that strives to provide the latest stable versions of most software by following a rolling-release model. The default installation is a minimal base system, configured by the user to only add what is purposely required.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Nextcloud
templates.description: Nextcloud is a suite of client-server software for creating and using file hosting services. Nextcloud provides functionality similar to Dropbox, Office 365 or Google Drive when used with integrated office suites Collabora Online or OnlyOffice.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Plex Media Server
templates.description:
Plex Media Server is free software that allows users to create a client–server for movies, television shows, and music. Free Plex accounts can share personal media libraries among a user's own collection of devices or with friends.

Plex Media Server organizes movie and television content and adds posters, plot summaries, cast and crew lists, technical details, critical reviews, and subtitles.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with GitLab
templates.description:
Self-hosted GitLab, an open-source DevOps platform, empowers you to install and manage it on your own infrastructure. Its comprehensive suite of features caters to code management, issue tracking, CI/CD, and more. With self-hosted GitLab, you gain complete control over your data, security, and customization, making it a cost-effective solution for teams and organizations of all sizes.
GitLab Configuration options

templates.name: CloudLinux 8 Solo
templates.description: CloudLinux OS Solo includes website monitoring, performance detection, and performance optimization tools, they allow to make sure that the website is up and running, help in investigating problems with WordPress, PHP, Database, and speed up a website.

templates.name: CloudLinux 8
templates.description: CloudLinux the operating system for multi-tenancy of shared server. It isolates each customer into a separate environment, which partitions, allocates, and limits server resources, like memory, CPU, and connections, for each tenant.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with OpenVPN
templates.description: OpenVPN is a trusted open-source VPN software that creates secure and encrypted connections for remote access and private networking. With robust encryption protocols and versatile compatibility, OpenVPN ensures privacy and data protection.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Jitsi
templates.description: Jitsi is an open-source video conferencing tool recognized for its security and user-friendly features. It supports real-time communication with options like screen sharing and chat, making it a popular choice for remote collaboration.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with ElasticSearch
templates.description: Elasticsearch is an open-source, distributed search and analytics engine built on Apache Lucene. It is designed for horizontal scalability, real-time search, and big data analysis, making it ideal for log and event data, full-text search, and complex queries.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Zabbix
templates.description: Zabbix is an open-source monitoring tool designed for tracking the status and performance of network services, servers, and other network hardware. It offers real-time monitoring of thousands of metrics collected from servers, virtual machines, and network devices. Zabbix provides features like visualization, alerting, and reporting, allowing for comprehensive analysis and troubleshooting.

templates.name: Kali Linux
templates.description: Kali Linux is a powerful, open-source operating system widely used for digital forensics and penetration testing. Developed by Offensive Security, it comes pre-loaded with a comprehensive suite of tools for security auditing, network testing, and identifying vulnerabilities within an IT environment. Kali Linux is designed for cybersecurity professionals and IT experts, featuring a customizable environment that supports a wide range of hardware platforms.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
templates.description: Ubuntu is a computer operating system based on the Debian Linux distribution and distributed as free and open source software, using its own desktop environment. Ubuntu is designed primarily for use on personal computers, although a server edition also exists.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with VS Code
templates.description: VS Code Server is a cloud-based development environment that lets you run Visual Studio Code in a remote, browser-based setup. It allows developers to work directly on cloud servers or virtual machines while accessing the full power of Visual Studio Code extensions and features.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Ollama
templates.description: Ollama is a platform that simplifies access to large language models. We have combined it with Open WebUI for an enhanced user experience. It provides an intuitive interface that allows developers to run, manage, and deploy AI models efficiently. With support for a range of models and seamless web integration, Ollama streamlines model deployment, making it easy to experiment, collaborate, and build applications leveraging powerful language models.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with TinyCP
templates.description: TinyCP is a lightweight web-based control panel designed for managing Linux servers, offering features like domain management, database administration, and file management through an intuitive interface. It is suitable for both small personal projects and larger professional deployments due to its simplicity and efficiency.

templates.name: Alpine Linux
templates.description: Alpine Linux is an independent, non-commercial, general purpose Linux distribution designed for power users who appreciate security, simplicity and resource efficiency.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Coolify
templates.description: Coolify is an open-source platform that simplifies the deployment and management of applications via a user-friendly control panel. It supports Docker, Kubernetes, and virtual machines, enabling continuous deployment from Git repositories. With tools for monitoring and resource management, Coolify is ideal for developers and teams aiming to streamline DevOps workflows.

templates.name: openSUSE Leap 15.6
templates.description: openSUSE is an open-source community project with Linux-based distributions that is sponsored by SUSE Software Solutions Germany GmbH and other companies. The openSUSE Project has a large global community that develops openSUSE in collaboration with the open-source community and corporate sponsors. The project’s distributions are free to download any time at no cost.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Owncast
templates.description: Owncast is an open-source, self-hosted streaming service that offers extensive customization and privacy for live broadcasts. It includes features like chat, viewer analytics, and configurable settings, making it ideal for creators seeking independence from commercial platforms and seeking full control over their streaming content and audience interactions.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Dokploy
templates.description: Dokploy is a platform designed to streamline application deployment and management across various environments. It automates key DevOps tasks such as deployments and scaling, integrates with existing CI/CD pipelines, and supports multiple programming languages and frameworks. With its user-friendly interface, Dokploy helps teams enhance efficiency and maintain application performance effectively.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Remote Desktop
templates.description:
XRDP is a free and open-source implementation of Microsoft RDP server that enables operating systems other than Microsoft Windows to provide a fully functional RDP-compatible remote desktop experience.
  • To connect to VPS you need a local computer with an RDP client installed. A list of available RDP clients for different operating systems is provided below:
  • On Windows, you can use the default Remote Desktop Connection application.
  • On macOS, you can use the Microsoft Remote Desktop application.
  • On Linux, you can use FreeRDP, or Remmina.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with CloudPanel
templates.description:
CloudPanel is a free and modern server control panel to configure and manage a server with an obsessive focus on simplicity.

Run PHP, Node.js, Static Websites, Reverse Proxies, and Python Applications in no time on a High-Performance Technology Stack.

templates.name: Debian 12 with FreePBX
templates.description: FreePBX is an open-source, web-based management tool for the Asterisk PBX system, offering a user-friendly interface for handling telephone communications. It supports features such as VoIP, call routing, and voicemail, providing a flexible and cost-effective telephony solution for businesses of all sizes.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with KUSANAGI 9
templates.description: Ultra-fast CMS platform "KUSANAGI" developed and provided by Prime Strategy is a Linux based tuned server OS (Virual Machine Image) that runs WordPress and other CMS fast and securely.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Node.js
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Node.js One-Click app automatically installs performance web server OpenLiteSpeed, and Node.js. This image tends to be more than 4 times faster than Node.js with Nginx! OpenLiteSpeed features easy setup for SSL and RewriteRules.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and WordPress
templates.description:
The OpenLiteSpeed WordPress One-Click app is based on a standard WordPress image, but includes several great performance enhancements, including LiteSpeed's popular LSCache optimization plugin. This Wordpress + OpenLiteSpeed + LSCache image tends to be more than 300 times faster than a regular WordPress image!

OpenLiteSpeed WordPress One-Click automatically installs OpenLiteSpeed, LSCache, WordPress and any dependences. It also automates initial setup for components like Object Cache and PHP OPCache to reduce the time it takes to optimize a web server.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Django
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Django One-Click app automatically installs performance web server OpenLiteSpeed, and Django. This image tends to be up to 2.5 times faster than Django on Nginx with Gunicorn! Developers can update files directly without using the built-in development server. OpenLiteSpeed features easy setup for SSL and RewriteRules.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Rails
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Rails One-Click app automatically installs performance web server OpenLiteSpeed, Ruby and Rails.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Joomla
templates.description:
The OpenLiteSpeed Joomla One-Click app is based on a standard Joomla image. Once you complete the setup, this Joomla + OpenLiteSpeed + LSCache image tends to be much faster than a regular Joomla image!

OpenLiteSpeed Joomla One-Click automatically installs OpenLiteSpeed, Joomla! and any dependences. It also automates initial setup for components like PHP OPCache to reduce the time it takes to optimize a web server.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenLiteSpeed and Drupal
templates.description: The OpenLiteSpeed Drupal One-Click automatically installs OpenLiteSpeed, Drupal and LSCache. It also automates initial setup for components like PHP OPCache to reduce the time it takes to optimize a web server.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with DirectAdmin
templates.description:
DirectAdmin is a graphical web-based web hosting control panel allowing administration of websites through a web browser. The software is configurable to enable standalone, reseller, and shared web hosting from a single instance
Our DirectAdmin template is preinstalled with OpenLiteSpeed and MariaDB

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with OpenCart
templates.description: OpenCart is a user-friendly, open-source e-commerce platform ideal for small to medium-sized businesses. It features multi-store management, diverse payment gateways, and customizable themes. OpenCart simplifies online store management with an efficient administrative dashboard, making it an effective solution for quick and easy online retail setup.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with TYPO3
templates.description: TYPO3 is an open-source CMS designed for building complex websites and web applications. It offers extensive customization through numerous extensions and features a user-friendly back-end. Known for scalability, strong multilingual support, and adaptability, TYPO3 is ideal for organizations needing a versatile web content management solution.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Laravel
templates.description: Laravel is a powerful open-source PHP framework designed for efficient web development, offering elegant syntax and features like routing, authentication, and caching. It includes tools such as Eloquent ORM and Blade templating, supported by extensive documentation and a vibrant community, making it ideal for creating scalable and maintainable web applications.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Strapi
templates.description: Strapi is a versatile open-source headless CMS based on Node.js, enabling quick API creation with customizable content types and extensive permissions. It supports RESTful and GraphQL APIs for seamless content delivery across platforms, offering flexibility and scalability for developers.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with WordPress
templates.description: WordPress is a popular open-source content management system known for its versatility and ease of use. Launched in 2003, it has grown from a blogging platform to a powerful tool for creating any type of website. Its strength lies in a vast ecosystem of themes and plugins, allowing for extensive customization and functionality. WordPress is accessible to beginners while offering advanced features for developers, making it ideal for both personal and professional websites. With a strong community support system, it remains a top choice for web development, offering tools for SEO, social media integration, and mobile responsiveness.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Ghost
templates.description: Ghost CMS is a modern, open-source content management system designed for professional publishing. It is particularly renowned for its simplicity, speed, and streamlined user experience. Built on Node.js, Ghost CMS differentiates itself from traditional CMS platforms by focusing primarily on blogging and content creation. It offers a clean, minimalist editor, live preview features, and a range of SEO and social sharing options

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Magento 2
templates.description: Magento 2 is a scalable, open-source e-commerce platform with a user-friendly interface, offering extensive customization, robust SEO, and mobile responsiveness. It supports multiple payment and shipping options, ideal for businesses looking to manage and enhance their online store efficiently.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Akaunting
templates.description: Akaunting is a free, open-source, and online accounting software for small businesses and freelancers.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with WooCommerce
templates.description: WooCommerce is a popular open-source e-commerce plugin for WordPress. It is designed for small to large-sized online merchants using WordPress, offering a range of customizable options for building an online store. Its flexibility and ease of integration with WordPress make it a widely favored choice for businesses looking to sell products and services online.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with PrestaShop
templates.description:
PrestaShop is a freemium, open source e-commerce platform. The software is published under the Open Software License. It is written in the PHP programming language with support for the MySQL database management system. It has a software dependency on the Symfony PHP framework.

CloudPanel is a free and modern server control panel to configure and manage a server with an obsessive focus on simplicity.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Moodle
templates.description:
Moodle is an open-source learning management system (LMS) widely used for creating and managing online educational courses. It provides a platform for educators to organize content, deliver lessons, and interact with students in a virtual learning environment. Moodle supports various multimedia formats, quizzes, assignments, and collaborative activities.

CloudPanel is a free and modern server control panel to configure and manage a server with an obsessive focus on simplicity.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Docker
templates.description: Docker is a cutting-edge containerization platform that revolutionizes the way software applications are developed, shipped, and deployed. By encapsulating an application and its dependencies within a lightweight container, Docker empowers developers to create consistent, isolated environments that function seamlessly across various computing environments, from development to production.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Easypanel
templates.description: Easypanel is a user-friendly control panel that simplifies server management. With its intuitive interface, you can effortlessly install applications, configure domains, manage email accounts, databases, and monitor server performance. It offers practical features like a file manager, DNS settings, and SSL certificate management, providing a seamless experience for beginners and experienced users alike. Focus on your website or application while leaving the technicalities to Easypanel.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Appwrite
templates.description: Appwrite is an open-source backend-as-a-service (BaaS) platform that simplifies the development of web, mobile, and server-side applications. It provides pre-built APIs for managing databases, authentication, cloud functions, and more, enabling developers to focus on building features without worrying about backend infrastructure. Designed for scalability and security, Appwrite supports multiple platforms and programming languages.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Uptime Kuma
templates.description: Uptime Kuma is a self-hosted monitoring tool designed to track the uptime status of websites, applications, or network services. It provides real-time alerts via various notification methods when monitored services go down or experience issues. Use cases include monitoring server availability, ensuring website uptime for businesses, and tracking the performance of APIs or critical infrastructure.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with cPanel
templates.description: cPanel - Web Hosting Management. The cPanel & WHM software package is an easy-to-use control panel that gives web hosts, and the website owners they serve, the ability to quickly and easily manage their servers and websites.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with Plesk
templates.description:
Plesk was designed to install and manage web hosting systems and applications on a single server. The control panel is designed to simplify the management and administration of the web sites by automating various tasks on a single server. Plesk allows a server administrator to set up new websites, reseller accounts, email accounts, and DNS entries through a web-based interface.
Plesk has integrated support for various Content Management Systems including WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, and other web software such as git, Docker, Multi-server management, as well as framework ready environment for Node.js, PHP, Python, Ruby on rails, and more.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with CyberPanel
templates.description: CyberPanel is a next-generation hosting control panel powered by OpenLiteSpeed/LiteSpeed. Built for speed, security, and reliability, CyberPanel automatically comes with built-in support for DNS, FTP, Databases, Email, File Manager, automatic SSL, and many other features, all this is free.

templates.name: Fedora Cloud 41
templates.description: Fedora Cloud is a streamlined version of the Fedora operating system tailored for cloud computing, offering a minimal footprint for containerized applications. It supports cutting-edge cloud technologies like Docker and Kubernetes, facilitating efficient container management. Ideal for developers and sysadmins, Fedora Cloud ensures fast, secure, and scalable deployments in both public and private cloud environments.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with Webuzo
templates.description:
Webuzo is a Single User Control Panel that helps users deploy Web Apps (WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, etc) or System Apps (Apache, NGINX, PHP, Java, MongoDB, etc) on their virtual machines or in the Cloud. Webuzo enables you to focus more on using applications rather than maintaining them. Webuzo is also available in the form of Virtual Appliances.
More information about Webuzo on webuzo.com
Follow the instructions on how to finish Webuzo installation.

templates.name: AlmaLinux 9 with Webmin
templates.description:
Webmin is a web-based interface for system administration for Unix. Using any modern web browser, you can setup user accounts, Apache, DNS, file sharing and much more. Webmin removes the need to manually edit Unix configuration files like /etc/passwd, and lets you manage a system from the console or remotely. More information about Webmin you will find at http://www.webmin.com/

Virtualmin is a powerful and flexible web hosting control panel for Linux and UNIX systems based on the well-known Open Source web-based systems management GUI, Webmin. Manage your virtual domains, mailboxes, databases, applications, and the entire server, from one comprehensive and friendly interface

More information about Virtualmin you will find at http://www.virtualmin.com/

Pre Installed network services are:
Apache
MySQL database
PHP

templates.name: Debian 12 with MediaWiki
templates.description: MediaWiki is an open-source wiki platform known for running Wikipedia. It supports collaborative editing and is highly scalable, with extensive customization options via extensions. Its version control system efficiently tracks changes, making it ideal for community-driven projects and documentation. MediaWiki is a go-to choice for creating detailed, collaborative online resources.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Cloudron
templates.description: Cloudron is a powerful platform that simplifies the deployment and management of web applications on virtual private servers. Designed for users familiar with technologies like Proxmox, PHP, and Bash, Cloudron streamlines the process of hosting and maintaining web apps. With its user-friendly interface, Cloudron enables easy installation, updates, and scaling of applications, making it an efficient solution for individuals and businesses looking to optimize their virtual server environments.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with FASTPANEL
templates.description: FASTPANEL is a web hosting control panel designed to simplify the management of servers and websites. It provides an intuitive user interface for tasks such as domain management, email setup, and database administration. With its focus on efficiency and ease of use, FASTPANEL is suitable for both novice users and experienced system administrators.

templates.name: CloudLinux 9
templates.description: CloudLinux the operating system for multi-tenancy of shared server. It isolates each customer into a separate environment, which partitions, allocates, and limits server resources, like memory, CPU, and connections, for each tenant.

templates.name: CentOS 10 Stream
templates.description: CentOS is a free operating system distribution based upon the Linux kernel. It is derived entirely from the Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) distribution. CentOS exists to provide a free enterprise-class computing platform and strives to maintain 100% binary compatibility with its upstream source, Red Hat. CentOS stands for Community Enterprise Operating System.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Redmine
templates.description: Redmine is an open-source project management and issue-tracking application that facilitates team collaboration and workflow management. It features customizable dashboards, time tracking, Gantt charts, and integration with various version control systems.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MetaTrader 5
templates.description: MetaTrader 5 (MT5) is a multi-asset trading platform designed for forex, stocks, and futures trading, offering advanced tools for market analysis and automated trading. It features enhanced charting, a wider range of technical indicators, support for more order types, and a built-in economic calendar, making it a comprehensive solution for professional traders.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with MetaTrader 4
templates.description: MetaTrader 4 (MT4) is a trading platform for forex, commodities, and CFDs that offers powerful tools for market analysis and automated trading. It features customizable charts, technical indicators, algorithmic trading via Expert Advisors (EAs), and support for multiple order types, providing a versatile solution for traders of all levels.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Portainer
templates.description: Portainer is your container management platform to deploy, troubleshoot, and secure applications across cloud, datacenter, and Industrial IoT use cases.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Dokku
templates.description: Dokku is an extensible, open source Platform as a Service that runs on a single server of your choice. Dokku supports building apps on the fly from a git push via either Dockerfile or by auto-detecting the language with Buildpacks, and then starts containers based on your built image. Using technologies such as nginx and cron, Web processes are automatically routed to, while background processes and automated cron tasks are also managed by Dokku.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with ASP.NET
templates.description: ASP.NET is a framework developed by Microsoft using the .NET framework to allow you to create innovative and modern web applications. It allows the use of the C#, F#, and Visual Basic programming languages in a modern Linux environment.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Peppermint.sh
templates.description: Peppermint.sh is an open source ticket management and help desk solution. It is a self-hosted alternative to commercial help desk solutions like Freshdesk and Zendesk. Peppermint.sh is written in React and Node.js and is deployed using Docker.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Grafana
templates.description: Grafana Open Source Software (OSS) enables you to query, visualize, alert on, and explore your metrics, logs, and traces wherever they’re stored. Grafana data source plugins enable you to query data sources including time series databases like Prometheus and CloudWatch, logging tools like Loki and Elasticsearch, NoSQL/SQL databases like Postgres, CI/CD tooling like GitHub, and many more. Grafana OSS provides you with tools to display that data on live dashboards with insightful graphs and visualizations.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with ClusterControl
templates.description: ClusterControl is a database management platform that simplifies deployment, monitoring, and automation for MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. It offers features like backups, failover, performance tuning, and security to ensure high availability and reliability.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Anaconda
templates.description: Anaconda is a popular open-source distribution of Python and R for data science, machine learning, and AI. It includes package management, environment management, and pre-installed libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and TensorFlow, making it easy to develop and deploy data-driven applications.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with PocketBase
templates.description: PocketBase is a versatile mobile database app designed for organizing and managing data on the go. It allows users to create custom databases, store information securely, and access data offline, making it ideal for both personal and professional use. With its user-friendly interface, PocketBase simplifies data management tasks wherever you are.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with n8n
templates.description: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that allows users to connect apps, services, and APIs with a visual, node-based interface. It enables automation of tasks, data processing, and integration between different systems without coding, offering flexibility and customization for various use cases.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with LEMP Stack (Nginx, MySQL, PHP)
templates.description: LEMP is a software stack commonly used for web development. It's an acronym that stands for Linux, Nginx, MySQL, and PHP. Each component in the stack plays a specific role in hosting and serving web applications.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with LAMP Stack (Apache, MySQL, PHP)
templates.description: LAMP stands for Linux, Apache, MySQL, and PHP. Together, they provide a proven set of software for delivering high-performance web applications. Each component contributes essential capabilities to the stack.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with Discourse
templates.description: Discourse is an open-source forum platform designed to create engaged online communities. It offers real-time notifications, a dynamic user interface, and robust moderation tools. Highly customizable and integrating well with third-party services.

templates.name: Ubuntu 22.04 with Bluesky
templates.description: Bluesky is a decentralized social media platform built on the AT Protocol, giving users control over their data and online experience. It enables interoperability, transparency, and algorithmic choice for a more open and user-driven network.

templates.name: Ubuntu 24.04 with AzuraCast
templates.description:
